allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; data = json.load\(open\('src/content/history/timeline.json'\)\); print\(f'Total periods: {len\(data[\\"periods\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'First period: {data[\\"periods\\"][0]}'\); print\(f'First period years count: {len\(data[\\"periods\\"][0][\\"years\\"]\)}'\)")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Name ollama -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Host 'Ollama stopped'")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Start-Process ollama -ArgumentList 'serve' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 5; Write-Host 'Ollama restarted'")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Stop-Process -Name ollama -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; $env:OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS='\\''1'\\''; Start-Process -FilePath '\\''ollama'\\'' -ArgumentList '\\''serve'\\'' -NoNewWindow -PassThru | Select-Object Id; Start-Sleep 8; Write-Host '\\''Ollama started with MAX_LOADED_MODELS=1'\\''')

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('data/acetec.db'\);db.prepare\('SELECT datetime\(created_at/1000,'+String.fromCharCode\(39\)+'unixepoch'+String.fromCharCode\(39\)+','+String.fromCharCode\(39\)+'localtime'+String.fromCharCode\(39\)+'\) as t, role, substr\(content,1,100\) as c FROM messages ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 30'\).all\(\).forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.t,'|',r.role,'|',r.c\)\);db.close\(\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/content/pages/home.json'\); console.log\('solutionCards exists:', Array.isArray\(d.solutionCards\), 'length:', d.solutionCards?.length\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('CHAT_API_SOURCES:'\); [print\(f'  {s[\\"category\\"]:10s} {s[\\"title\\"]}'\) for s in d.get\('sources',[]\)]")
